headline: Marriott logo now adorns Renaissance Center, the former GM HQ
summary: General Motors still owns the building that has largely emptied of occupants since the automaker moved to a new location on Woodward in Detroit.

headline: Mayfair Gold to acquire three properties from Plato
summary: The Guibord, Marriott, and Holloway properties are near Mayfair’s Fenn-Gib Gold Project, east of Timmins, Ontario.
